rationale: H1 and H2 both reached their frozen rejection conditions; Stable comparison was correctly withheld, and no authorized path can produce new decision-changing evidence.
mission_alignment: Closing with STOP_2X_EXPLORATION is one of the four authorized Mission outcomes and preserves every frozen acceptance threshold.

mission_review.objective_alignment: The Mission sought an evidence-backed continue, stop, or requires-William terminal outcome; STOP is now evidenced.
mission_review.acceptance_gap: No required terminal artifact remains; positive continuation criteria were not met and are not being inferred.
mission_review.task_contribution: All tasks now carry H1 rejection, H2 rejection, skipped-comparison, and terminal-report evidence.
mission_review.roi_effect: Further work has negative authorized ROI because it requires a rerun, new architecture, or relaxed boundary.
mission_review.non_action_risk: Stopping leaves 1.4.6 as the functional baseline and preserves reproducible evidence; it creates no release action.
